title: DailyRewards
description: Reward players with daily prizes and bonuses.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The DailyRewards plugin offers a simple yet effective solution for rewarding players with daily bonuses every time they log in to the server and use the /daily command. Designed to encourage consistent play and boost player retention, this plugin tracks when players claim their rewards and ensures that they can only receive them once per day. With configurable commands, server administrators have full control over the types of rewards given. [Here is a detailed breakdown of its features and functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/41)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
 
Are you a developer?
